ie.updateNote: Citizens should exercise a high degree of caution if travelling to Eswatini. In particular citizens should avoid protests, demonstrations or marches. Protests and demonstrations that broke out in 2021 resulted in significant damage and loss of life, and civil unrest continues, as does rising crime, arson attacks, and violent incidents. The security situation can change suddenly, and travellers sho

au.updateNote: Still current at:09 July 2026 Updated:13 February 2026 Latest update:We continue to advise exercise a high degree of caution due to the risk of civil unrest.
